author: kellyvv
name: Optimal Encoding for Error Correction Tables (Golomb-Rice)
blurb: Information-theoretically optimal Golomb-Rice encoding for correction table positions. Achieves near-Shannon-optimal 2.76-2.96 bytes/entry vs varint's 3.01-3.16 (6-9% savings). Includes full encode/decode, auto-tuned m_bits, and benchmark suite.
